title: Add net10.0 TFM support alongside net9.0
body:
- [x] Add `net10.0` to `SkiaSharp.Extended.csproj` (keep `netstandard2.0;net9.0`)
- [x] Add `net10.0` and `net10.0-android36.0` (and platform variants) to `SkiaSharp.Extended.UI.Maui.csproj` (keep net9 TFMs)
- [x] Update `SkiaSharp.Extended.Tests.csproj` to target `net9.0;net10.0`
- [x] Update `SkiaSharp.Extended.UI.Maui.Tests.csproj` to target `net9.0;net10.0`
- [x] Add `net10.0-android` (and platform variants) to `SkiaSharpDemo.csproj` (keep net9 TFMs)
- [x] Fix `SKConfettiColorCollectionTypeConverter` to trim individual color tokens before parsing (fixes net10 CI failure where `ColorTypeConverter` no longer trims whitespace)
- [x] Build verified: all projects build successfully for all TFMs

<!-- START COPILOT CODING AGENT TIPS -->
---

🔒 GitHub Advanced Security automatically protects Copilot coding agent pull requests. You can protect all pull requests by enabling Advanced Security for your repositories. [Learn more about Advanced Security.](https://gh.io/cca-advanced-security)

comments.author: Copilot
comments.body:
> @copilot 
> 
> ```...

Fixed in 9968043. In .NET 10, `ColorTypeConverter.ConvertFromInvariantString` no longer trims whitespace from individual tokens, so `" red"` failed to parse. Added `.Trim()` to each individual `part` before passing it to the color converter in `SKConfettiColorCollectionTypeConverter`.
